compiled_state.title: ticket list missing --type filter and --help option
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Two features are missing from the ticket list CLI:

1. **--type filter**: `dso ticket list --type=epic` returns 'Error: unknown option'. Should filter output by ticket_type (epic, story, task, bug).

2. **--help option**: `dso ticket list --help` returns 'Error: unknown option'. All ticket subcommands should support --help with usage information.

Both are standard CLI expectations that force workarounds (piping full JSON through python3 filters).

comments.body: Classification: behavioral. Score: 2 (severity=1, complexity=1, env=0) → BASIC investigation.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
